title: Restrict access to workspace
excerpt:
Im trying to restrict any access to my workspace, however it seems Im not able to do so. 
Only solution is to make all my boards private within the workspace? Right? 
Im having the ProPlan.

posts.author: Pierce007 (Rune Haarberg)
posts.cookedHtml:
Im trying to restrict any access to my workspace, however it seems Im not able to do so.
Only solution is to make all my boards private within the workspace? Right?
Im having the ProPlan.

posts.author: Fario_Consulting (Fario Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,
In case you are concerned that other users would be able to edit stuff on your board (but not bothered whether they could see it)…you could look into locking your boards.
Cheers,
Harsh
